data.title: Dragonfly VC believes both Solana and Ethereum can thrive in tokenization with room for multiple blockchains.
data.description: Rob Hadick of Dragonfly believes that the cryptocurrency space has ample space for multiple blockchains to thrive. Different networks are competing to dominate the market for tokenized assets.

data.title: Caliway submits IND for Phase 2 study of fat reduction drug CBL-514 with GLP-1RA, expanding weight management development.
data.description: A company named Caliway has recently finalized the submission of an Investigational New Drug (IND) application to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for a Phase 2 clinical trial of a drug called CBL-514 designed for weight management, known as CBL-0201WR Phase 2. This study aims to assess the effectiveness of CBL-514 when used alongside Zepbound® (manufactured by Eli Lilly). The submission marks a significant step in advancing research in this area, with potential implications for individuals seeking weight management solutions.

data.title: Kraken exec says tokenization expands money def to any asset, allowing trading in diverse assets.
data.description: According to Mark Greenberg of Kraken, blockchain tokenization is greatly broadening the concept of currency, allowing individuals to exchange, store, and utilize a wide range of assets. This innovation is revolutionizing the financial landscape by providing the opportunity for anyone to engage in transactions with various assets.

data.title: Record turnout with thousands of Santas surfing in Cocoa Beach on Christmas Eve 2025 presented by Orlando Health.
data.description: A popular holiday tradition unfolded on Florida's Space Coast in Cocoa Beach, as crowds gathered for the annual Surfing Santas event on Christmas Eve, December 24, 2025. Thousands of people flocked to the surfing capital to witness Santas riding epic waves in a picture-perfect setting. The festive event attracted a significant number of participants and onlookers, making it a vibrant celebration of the holiday season.
